description: Harness hook config snippets for graph automation. Merge these entries into the appropriate harness config files during `ai-catapult graph-hooks install`. Engine-absent no-op: both commands route through the wrapper which checks `command -v {{ENGINE}}` before running.

claude_code.note: Merge the hooks array entries below into the top-level 'hooks' array in .claude/settings.json.

entries.description: Background graph refresh after each agent session stop. Routes through lock+coalesce wrapper; exits 0 always.
Validate/refresh graph at session start. Same wrapper; no-op when engine absent.

codex.note: Merge the hooks object entries below into .codex/hooks.json (or set as the file body if absent).
